name: PATHWAYS_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Given a TargetPair, list associated pathways with patent counts.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
MATCH (tp)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target)-[:IN_PATHWAY]->(pw:Pathway)
RETURN pw.name AS pathway, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, pathway ASC
LIMIT 50;

result_schema.patent_count: Number of patents linked to targets in the pathway

examples: Which pathways are most associated with PD-1×VEGFA?
